hypothesis: If a small language model is continually pre-trained on MOF-focused literature and large molecular corpora and then fine-tuned on limited MOF property datasets using MOFid text inputs, then it will achieve lower MAE than structure-based baselines and models without such pre-training on band gap and gas adsorption prediction because domain-specific pre-training transfers chemical structure–property knowledge that improves generalization, especially in low-resource regimes.
